message:
beads(cm): expand flywheel_gateway-1hv notes with test plan

This updates the Beads JSONL snapshot for issue flywheel_gateway-1hv only.

- Replaces the prior agent-protocol-style notes block with a structured testing checklist.

- Adds unit test coverage items for CMClient methods (context, playbook, onboard).

- Adds response-shape assertions (relevantBullets/antiPatterns/historySnippets extraction).

- Adds integration/performance/failure-mode test checklists to make implementation verifiable.

- No code changes; this is issue metadata/docs carried in .beads.
